selections.rationale: All 11 reviews passed with 0 BLOCKING + 0 CRITICAL. Resonance score 70/100 exceeds 65 threshold. Route C all 3 hard binaries passed. Single anti-ai 'error' (470 —— dashes) is a false positive — the audit explicitly calls this a structural requirement of parameter narrative syntax, not an AI tell, and recommends a rule exemption.

adjustments.rationale: Anti-AI audit flagged 470 —— dashes as ERROR. The audit's own analysis confirms this is a parameter narrative structural syntax element: '参数语法中的——不应与自然语言叙事中的——等同判定'. Replacing 470 dashes would change the chapter's syntactic grammar without improving quality. Recommendation: add anti-ai rule exemption for parameter narrative syntax in this project.

Resonance audit identifies 4 shortcomings (emotional ceiling, no physical anchors, limited vocabulary, cognitive-only rewards). All are structural costs of workday parameter narrative mode — not fixable without violating the exclusion mode. Both route_identity and story_depth audits cover these as expected tradeoffs, not defects. No revision action taken.

Anchors AC-001/002/004/005 are traditional narrative benchmarks structurally incompatible with parameter narrative mode. The audit annotated this as structural_mismatch. No revision needed — the mismatch is in the anchor framework, not the chapter.
